description: A debate at Breakpoint 2024 discussing whether Solana is more future-proof than Ethereum, featuring Santiago from SRS and Avicil from Electric Capital. The discussion covers definitions of future-proofing, technology resilience, application variety, and user diversity.
topic_summary: The debate centers on the future-proofing of Solana versus Ethereum, with arguments focusing on technology resilience, application variety, and user base diversity. Avicil argues Ethereum's established network and developer ecosystem make it more future-proof [t=270:52].
